channel.title: The Agent Index
channel.description: The living index of AI agent frameworks — multi-agent, autonomous agents, orchestration, memory and agent SDKs.

item.title: DietrichGebert/ponytail — momentum 93
item.description: Makes your AI agent think like the laziest senior dev in the room. The best code is the code you never wrote.

item.title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT — momentum 87
item.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

item.title: langchain-ai/langchain — momentum 86
item.description: The agent engineering platform.

item.title: browser-use/browser-use — momentum 84
item.description: 🌐 Make websites accessible for AI agents. Automate tasks online with ease.

item.title: bytedance/deer-flow — momentum 83
item.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

item.title: mem0ai/mem0 — momentum 82
item.description: Universal memory layer for AI Agents

item.title: cobusgreyling/loop-engineering — momentum 82
item.description: Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny). Includes loop-audit, loop-init, loop-cost.

item.title: crewAIInc/crewAI — momentum 81
item.description: Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. By fostering collaborative intelligence, CrewAI empowers agents to work together seamlessly, tackling complex tasks.

item.title: run-llama/llama_index — momentum 81
item.description: LlamaIndex is the leading document agent and OCR platform

item.title: HKUDS/nanobot — momentum 81
item.description: Lightweight, open-source AI agent for your tools, chats, and workflows.

item.title: elder-plinius/T3MP3ST — momentum 81
item.description: autonomous red teaming platform; multi-agent offensive-security meta-harness

item.title: agno-agi/agno — momentum 80
item.description: Build, run, and manage agent platforms.

item.title: CopilotKit/CopilotKit — momentum 80
item.description: The Frontend Stack for Agents & Generative UI. React, Angular, Mobile, Slack, and more. Makers of the AG-UI Protocol

item.title: browser-use/browser-harness — momentum 80
item.description: Browser Harness | Self-healing harness that enables LLMs to complete any task.

item.title: mindsdb/minds — momentum 79
item.description: Delegate anything. It comes back done.

item.title: langchain-ai/langgraph — momentum 79
item.description: Build resilient agents.

item.title: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot — momentum 79
item.description: AI Agent Assistant & development framework that integrates lots of IM platforms, LLMs, plugins and AI feature, and can be your openclaw alternative. ✨

item.title: ComposioHQ/composio — momentum 79
item.description: Composio powers 1000+ toolkits, tool search, context management, authentication, and a sandboxed workbench to help you build AI agents that turn intent into action.

item.title: simstudioai/sim — momentum 79
item.description: Build, deploy, and orchestrate AI agents. Sim is the central intelligence layer for your AI workforce.

item.title: OpenBMB/ChatDev — momentum 78
item.description: ChatDev 2.0: Dev All through LLM-powered Multi-Agent Collaboration

item.title: getzep/graphiti — momentum 78
item.description: Build Real-Time Knowledge Graphs for AI Agents

item.title: assafelovic/gpt-researcher — momentum 78
item.description: An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers

item.title: openai/openai-agents-python — momentum 78
item.description: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows

item.title: agentscope-ai/agentscope — momentum 78
item.description: Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.

item.title: topoteretes/cognee — momentum 78
item.description: Cognee is the open-source AI memory platform for agents. Give your AI agents persistent long-term memory across sessions with a self-hosted knowledge graph engine.

item.title: volcengine/OpenViking — momentum 78
item.description: Self-evolving Context Database for AI Agents. Unify Agent Memory, Knowledge RAG and Skills.

item.title: PrefectHQ/fastmcp — momentum 78
item.description: 🚀 The fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.

item.title: mastra-ai/mastra — momentum 78
item.description: Mastra is the modern TypeScript framework for AI-powered applications and agents.

item.title: deepset-ai/haystack — momentum 78
item.description: Open-source AI orchestration framework for building context-engineered, production-ready LLM applications. Design modular pipelines and agent workflows with explicit control over retrieval, routing, memory, and generation. Built for scalable agents, RAG, multimodal applications, semantic search, and

item.title: a2aproject/A2A — momentum 78
item.description: Agent2Agent (A2A) is an open protocol enabling communication and interoperability between opaque agentic applications.
